title: Cobblemon - Regions Unexplored Compat
description: This pack adds compatibility between Cobblemon and Regions Unexplored for Pokémon spawns.
body:
# Cobblemon - Regions Unexplored Compat
This data pack adds compatibility between Cobblemon (Version 1.6+) and Regions Unexplored, adding spawns to Pokémon in the biomes from Regions Unexplored. This pack only adds spawn tags to the biomes without modifying any of the spawns directly, so the pack should be fully compatible with custom spawns. 

Feel free to use or modify this pack in any way.
